description_long: This object is a high-end desktop computer tower, featuring a transparent side panel that reveals internal components such as a large graphics card with triple fans, a motherboard, RGB lighting, and a liquid cooling system. The front panel is equipped with three intake fans, each with a red hub, and vertical RGB light strips on both sides. The rear panel has a single exhaust fan and standard I/O cutouts. The case is predominantly black with a prominent illuminated ROG (Republic of Gamers) logo on the interior shroud. The build quality appears robust, with a mix of metal, tempered glass, and plastic materials. This type of computer is typically used for gaming, content creation, or other high-performance computing tasks.
description: A premium desktop computer tower with a transparent side panel, visible RGB lighting, and multiple cooling fans. The case is mostly black with a prominent ROG logo and high-end internal components.
description_view_0: Rear view showing a single exhaust fan and the back panel of the case.
description_view_1: Side view with a transparent panel revealing the internal components, RGB lighting, and the ROG logo.
description_view_2: Front view displaying three intake fans with red hubs and vertical RGB light strips.
description_view_3: Solid side panel with a vertical RGB light strip, no internal components visible.
